---
title: "Lyne"
subtitle: "Data Scientist"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: IMG_5073 copy.jpg

about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lyne-joseph-a54b70302
---

A little bit about me and my life.

## Education

University of South Florida, Tampa \| Jun 2023 - May 2027

Junior majoring in Finance and Risk Management & insurance. 

## Experience

Busch Gardens \| Ambassador \| October 2025 - present
